title: rosa × dumetorum var. juncta
intro: Rosa × dumetorum var. juncta, also known as Rosa juncta, is a variant of the Rosa × dumetorum hybrid, a type of wild rose that belongs to the Rosaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its content of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rosa juncta include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory problems. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be used in herbal infusions, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and optimal usage.
